summary:
Para-cervical block has not been studied or mentioned as part of second-trimester abortion induction using gemeprost; therefore, it offers no clinically supported advantage over other methods in this setting.

Second sentence must state clearly what conclusion follows medically: since neither gemeprost nor para-cervical technique appears in supporting research, they do not provide any proven benefit.
